title: postapiauthloginwithvalidcredentials
description: Verify that POST /api/auth/login with valid username and password returns HTTP 200 and a JWT token in the response body.

title: postapiauthloginwithinvalidcredentials
description: Verify that POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials returns HTTP 401 with an authentication error message.

title: getapipurchaseswithauthorization
description: Verify that GET /api/purchases with a valid Authorization Bearer token returns HTTP 200 with a list of purchases.

title: postapipurchaseswithvalidpayload
description: Verify that POST /api/purchases with a valid Authorization Bearer token and valid purchase payload creates a new purchase, returns HTTP 201 with the created purchase record, and updates inventory quantities accordingly.

title: postapipurchaseswithinvalidpayload
description: Verify that POST /api/purchases with a valid Authorization Bearer token but invalid payload (missing required fields) returns HTTP 400 with validation error details.

title: getapisaleswithauthorization
description: Verify that GET /api/sales with a valid Authorization Bearer token returns HTTP 200 with a list of sales.

title: postapisaleswithvalidpayload
description: Verify that POST /api/sales with a valid Authorization Bearer token and valid sale payload (quantities within available stock) creates a new sale, returns HTTP 201 with the created sale record, and decreases inventory quantities accordingly.

title: postapisaleswithinsufficientstock
description: Verify that POST /api/sales with a valid Authorization Bearer token but sale payload requesting quantities exceeding available stock returns HTTP 400 with an insufficient stock error.

title: getapiitemswithauthorization
description: Verify that GET /api/items with a valid Authorization Bearer token returns HTTP 200 with a list of items and their current quantities.
